rationale: Fin. Code §351.0021 governs authorized charges by property tax lenders and does not reference the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). Increasing the exemption does not conflict with any provision regarding lender fees or charges.
quote: Sec. 351.0021. AUTHORIZED CHARGES. (a) The contract between a property tax lender and a property owner may require the property owner to pay the following costs after closing:
_note: No direct or indirect conflict identified. The rule text addresses lender-authorized charges and does not reference homestead exemption amounts.
